title: Heart Indicator Compact
description: A mod that shows the player health above them, but in compact way.
body:
**Heart Indicator Compact** is a clean and lightweight Minecraft mod that displays player health directly above their character. Instead of guessing during fights, you can instantly see how much health a player has left — shown clearly as **numeric hearts (e.g., 20❤️)**.

This mod is perfect for PvP, multiplayer servers, or anyone who wants better combat awareness without adding heavy UI elements.

## ✨ Features

- ❤️ Shows player health above their head (example: `20❤️`)
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
- 🎮 Customizable keybind to toggle the indicator ON/OFF anytime
- ⬆️⬇️ Adjustable overlay position  
  - Press **Arrow UP** to move the heart indicator higher  
  - Press **Arrow DOWN** to move it lower
- 🧩 Minimal and compact design that blends naturally with gameplay

## 🎯 Why Use It?

Heart Indicator Compact keeps things simple — no unnecessary features and no performance impact. It provides a clean and practical way to track player health in real time, helping you make smarter decisions during combat.

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
